title: Bison River Knives

products.title: Bison River 3 3/4" Wood Folding Knife with Damascus Steel Blade and Leather Sheath
products.displayName: Bison River 3 3/4" Wood Folding Knife with Damascus Steel Blade and Leather Sheath
products.description: This Bison River folding knife is made to last and features a wood handle and Damascus Steel blade, known for strength and the distinctive patterns   embedded in the steel. The knife comes in a leather sheath with a snap closure and slits on the back so it can be worn on your belt. This beautiful knife is perfect for groomsmen gifts or personalized gifts for any occasion.
products.imageAlt: Bison River 3 3/4" Wood Folding Knife with Damascus Steel Blade and Leather Sheath

products.title: Bison River 9 1/2" Fixed Blade Wood Knife with Damascus Steel Blade and Leather Sheath
products.displayName: Bison River 9 1/2" Fixed Blade Wood Knife with Damascus Steel Blade and Leather Sheath
products.description: This high quality fixed blade knife is made to last. The size, weight, and shape of the handle makes it comfortable in your hand, and the large fingerchoil provides added safety. It has a Damascus Steel blade, known for strength and for the distinctive patterns embedded in the steel. The knife comeswith a durable leather sheath that features a snap closure and a riveted belt loop. Packaged in a Bison River branded box, it makes a great gift!
products.imageAlt: Bison River 9 1/2" Fixed Blade Wood Knife with Damascus Steel Blade and Leather Sheath

products.title: Bison River 4" Black 13 Function Multi Tool with Nylon Sheath
products.displayName: Bison River 4" Black 13 Function Multi Tool with Nylon Sheath
products.description: The Bison River 13 Function Multi Tool comes in a nylon sheath with a hook and loop closure and a belt loop on the back. Slide it on your belt to keep it handy, or the compact size makes it perfect for your backpack or to keep in your vehicle. With 13 tools incorporated, you'll have what you need for just about any situation. The 13 function multi-tool is packaged in a Bison River branded box and makes a great gift or incentive.
products.imageAlt: Bison River 4" Black 13 Function Multi Tool with Nylon Sheath

products.title: Bison River 3 1/2" Blue/Bone Folding Knife
products.displayName: Bison River 3 1/2" Blue/Bone Folding Knife
products.description: This handsome pocket knife features a bone handle with a blue epoxy inlay and a stainless steel blade. The lock back blade allows for easy open and close. Durable and nice looking, this knife makes a great personalized gift that will last for years with proper care. It comes packaged in a Bison River branded presentation box.
products.imageAlt: Bison River 3 1/2" Blue/Bone Folding Knife

products.title: Bison River 4 1/2" Black Rescue Knife
products.displayName: Bison River 4 1/2" Black Rescue Knife
products.description: This aluminum spring assisted knife with a clip features a stainless steel blade, glass breaker, and seatbelt cutter. It's perfect to keep in your vehicle in case of emergencies where you need to be able to make a quick exit.Avaliable in several colors, it's a gift or incentive that could save lives. Packaged in a Bison River branded box, this knife is also available with a wood handle.
products.imageAlt: Black Bison River 4 1/2" Rescue Knife

products.title: Bison River 4 1/2" Wood Button Lock Folding Knife
products.displayName: Bison River 4 1/2" Wood Button Lock Folding Knife
products.description: This handy folding knife features a beautiful wood handle and stainless steel blade. It has a button lock located on the handle that is used to lock the blade in place and when pressed, disengages the lock allowing the blade to be closed. Your fingers never need to be in the blade's path when closing so it's a great safety feature. It's light weight and smooth operation makes this a very popular style of knife. Packaged in a Bison River branded box, this knife makes a great gift or incentive.
products.imageAlt: Bison River 4 1/2" Wood Button Lock Folding Knife

products.title: Bison River 2" Black Everyday Carry Knife
products.displayName: Bison River 2" Black Everyday Carry Knife
products.description: This folding everyday carry pocket knife features an anodized aluminum handle and stainless steel blade. The perfect size to carry in your pocket or on a key chain, they're handy for tasks such as opening packages or minor repairs. Durable and made to last, they're light weight and have a nice sized personalization area. Available in four colors, they're packaged in a Bison River Box and make a great gift for anyone!

products.title: 17 1/2" Short Fireman Axe with Blade Guard
products.displayName: 17 1/2" Short Fireman Axe with Blade Guard
products.description: The 17 1/2" fireman's ceremonial axe is an ultimate recognition for any fire/rescue first responder. Personalized and on it's own, or added to a plaque or other award base, it's perfect for retirements, years of service, or to acknowledge bravery and valor on the job. The axe comes with a black PU Leather sheath.
products.imageAlt: 17 1/2" Short Fireman Axe with Blade Guard
